human_review_items.summary: Commit 64740d0 ('Remove answer-giving nudges from data-cleaning task prompts') targeted dc-* tasks but also stripped 'in WGS84 (EPSG:4326)' from this geo-* task's closing sentence; per-task rationale not stated in the commit message. Documentation/intent gap only - the implicit-CRS instruction has repeatedly proven well-calibrated, most recently with two post-weighting DeepSeek runs scoring 0.947 (reprojection miss) while the geometric work passes in full.
